metaTitle: Export Table to PDF Online — Free | {{BRAND_NAME}}
metaDescription: Export any table to PDF in one click. No browser print dialog, no UI chrome — just your table, clean and publication-ready. Free, no signup.
heroHeadline: Publication-ready PDF export — no print dialog.
heroSubtext: Tablesmit exports your table directly to PDF. Clean output, no interface chrome, no quality compromise. Your table exactly as you built it.

benefits.heading: Table only — no UI chrome
benefits.body: The PDF contains your table and caption. No navigation bar, no toolbar, no surrounding interface. Ready to attach to any document.

benefits.heading: Text-based, not an image
benefits.body: Text in your exported PDF is selectable and searchable. Screen readers can read it. It is a real document, not a screenshot.

benefits.heading: Themes export faithfully
benefits.body: Header colours, border styles, and cell formatting are preserved in the PDF. Academic, Default, Striped — they all render correctly.

benefits.heading: Processed in your browser
benefits.body: The PDF is generated locally using html2canvas and jsPDF. Nothing is uploaded. Your data stays on your machine.

steps.heading: Build and format your table
steps.body: Set headers, fill in data, apply a theme, and resize columns. Add a caption — it will appear above the table in the PDF.

steps.heading: Click PDF
steps.body: Click the PDF button in the toolbar. The export processes in the browser.

steps.heading: Download
steps.body: Your PDF downloads instantly. The filename uses your table caption if one exists, or 'tablesmit-export.pdf' by default.

useCases: Attaching a data table to a research paper or journal submission
Sending a structured table to a client in a format that opens on any device
Embedding a clean table in a report without needing Word or Google Docs
Creating printable reference tables for workshops and presentations
